channel.title: FXNewsBias Daily Insights
channel.description: Daily forex market insights focused on the highest-impact news and what traders should watch next.

item.title: USD Rallies Above 99.50 on Fed Hawks & Eurozone PMI Collapse
item.description: New York is opening — here is the forex sentiment setup heading into the US session. US Dollar (USD) leads forex sentiment today with a strong bullish reading. Here is what drove the move and what to watch next.

item.title: AUD Falls to 0.7100 on April Jobless Shock, RBA June Hold Locked In
item.description: London is opening — here is the forex sentiment setup heading into the European session. Australian Dollar (AUD) faces the strongest bearish news pressure across the majors today. Here is what triggered the move and where it goes from here.

item.title: AUD Rallies to 0.7150 on Employment Data & US-Iran Peace Hopes
item.description: Asia session is opening — here is the overnight forex sentiment picture as Tokyo, Singapore and Sydney desks come online. Australian Dollar (AUD) leads forex sentiment today with a strong bullish reading. Here is what drove the move and what to watch next.

item.title: USD Rallies to Post-Crisis Yields as Fed Tightening Bets Surge
item.description: New York is opening — here is the forex sentiment setup heading into the US session. US Dollar (USD) leads forex sentiment today with a strong bullish reading. Here is what drove the move and what to watch next.
